"'''The Lambda Heist'''" is a ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' Adventure published in [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]]. It was written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and illustrated by [[Mike Vilardi]]. It focuses on a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who must steal a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda'']]-class shuttle to pay for repairs to their own ship.

{{Game-stub}}
